description: A sample exchange descriptor file used in ExchangeApiInterfaceImplementationGeneratorTest unit test

apis.name: MarketData
apis.description: An API with no rate limits

restEndpoints.name: exchangeInfo
restEndpoints.description: Fetch market information of symbols that can be traded

properties.name: symbols
properties.description: The list of symbol to fetch market information for. Leave empty to fetch all markets

properties.name: payload
properties.description: List of market information for each requested symbol

properties.name: symbol
properties.description: Symbol to subscribe to ticker stream of

apis.name: Trading
apis.description: An API group with one rule that is not used by any endpoint. The getter method should be still generated, but no RequestThrottler used.

restEndpoints.name: exchangeInfo
restEndpoints.description: Fetch market information of symbols that can be traded

properties.name: symbols
properties.description: The list of symbol to fetch market information for. Leave empty to fetch all markets

properties.name: payload
properties.description: List of market information for each requested symbol

apis.name: FuturesMarketData
apis.description: An API with endpoint specific rate limit

restEndpoints.name: exchangeInfo
restEndpoints.description: Fetch market information of symbols that can be traded

properties.name: symbols
properties.description: The list of symbol to fetch market information for. Leave empty to fetch all markets

properties.name: payload
properties.description: List of market information for each requested symbol

restEndpoints.name: exchangeInfo2
restEndpoints.description: Same as exchangeInfo, uses same rate limit rule defined below without timeframe and maxRequest count attributes, because using same id is enough to reference previous.

properties.name: symbols
properties.description: The list of symbol to fetch market information for. Leave empty to fetch all markets

properties.name: payload
properties.description: List of market information for each requested symbol

apis.name: FuturesTrading
apis.description: An API with API group specific rate limits

restEndpoints.name: exchangeInfo
restEndpoints.description: Fetch market information of symbols that can be traded

properties.name: symbols
properties.description: The list of symbol to fetch market information for. Leave empty to fetch all markets

properties.name: payload
properties.description: List of market information for each requested symbol
